case_title: JASON PEREZ VS. ANDRE DEFONSECA ET AL

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY PLAINTIFF PEREZ, JASON
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-02-2018 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO JAN-14-2019 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-14-2019 - JUDGMENT.
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY PEREZ, JASON AS TO DEFENDANT DEFONSECA, ANDRE LUXOR CABS, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-02-2018 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE OF ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE FILED BY PLAINTIFF PEREZ, JASON SERVED DEC-03-2018, MAIL AS TO DEFENDANT DEFONSECA, ANDRE
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT LUXOR CABS, INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE OF SMALL CLAIMS CONTINUANCE ORDER FILED BY PLAINTIFF PEREZ, JASON SERVED OCT-17-2018, MAIL AS TO DEFENDANT DEFONSECA, ANDRE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-14-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-14-2019 BY JUDGE PRO TEM MAXWELL PRITT. PLAINTIFF JASON PEREZ APPEARED. DEFENDANT ANDRE DEFONSECA APPEARED. DEFENDANT LUXOR CABS, INC. APPEARED, REPRESENTED BY JOHN LAZAR, PRESIDENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM MAXWELL PRITT, CLERK: A. MOK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $45.00) SERVED SEP-30-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT LUXOR CABS, INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED OCT-19-2018, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT DEFONSECA, ANDRE

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PEREZ, JASON IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT DEFONSECA, ANDRE LUXOR CABS, INC. PLAINTIFF CONCEDES DEFENDANTS REPAIRED THE DAMAGE DONE TO HIS CAR; AND PLAINTIFF DID NOT SUFFER ANY BODILY HARM OR INJURY. ALTHOUGH PLAINTIFF ATTENDED MENTAL HEALTH SESSIONS, THEY WERE ALREADY SCHEDULED; NO ADDITIONAL SESSIONS WERE SCHEDULED AS A RESULT OF THE ACCIDENT. THE COURT DECLINES TO AWARD DAMAGES FOR ANY GENERAL PAIN, SUFFERING OR INCONVENIENCE INCURRED BY PLAINTIFF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF PEREZ, JASON AS TO DEFENDANT DEFONSECA, ANDRE
ORDER GRANTING REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM COMMISSIONER FILED BY PEREZ, JASON DEFONSECA, ANDRE LUXOR CABS, INC.
